name: Not a bot!!
description:
Hi hi! Really sorry that I haven’t made any new bots, my assignments have been kicking my ass recently.

I’m making this bot to just to ask for a little bit of help really. I’ve been trying to get into B1ank’s server, just to be able to get more art of Stro and Spro and Cozz, but I have had ZERO luck getting a link that is valid. I dunno if the server is just completely gone or if a new link just hasn’t been made yet.

If anyone can help me at all, just shoot a comment!
creator: BasilEvergarden
